allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Stars: {d.get\(""stargazers_count""\)}\\nForks: {d.get\(""forks_count""\)}\\nOpen Issues: {d.get\(""open_issues_count""\)}\\nCreated: {d.get\(""created_at""\)}\\nUpdated: {d.get\(""updated_at""\)}\\nPushed: {d.get\(""pushed_at""\)}\\nSize: {d.get\(""size""\)}\\nLanguage: {d.get\(""language""\)}\\nLicense: {d.get\(""license"",{}\).get\(""spdx_id""\) if d.get\(""license""\) else ""None""}\\nDefault Branch: {d.get\(""default_branch""\)}\\nTopics: {d.get\(""topics""\)}''''\)")
